faults.title: Water supply error
faults.description: Check water tap, inlet valve, mesh filter, hose kink, and water pressure.

faults.title: Drain error
faults.description: Clean pump filter, check drain pump, hose blockage, and drain height.

faults.title: Door error
faults.description: Inspect door lock, strike, harness, and door alignment.

faults.title: Motor / drive error
faults.description: Inspect motor connector, hall sensor, stator wiring, and overload condition.

faults.title: Water level sensor error
faults.description: Check pressure sensor tube, sensor wiring, and trapped water/foam condition.

faults.title: Unbalance detected
faults.description: Check load distribution, suspension, and spin basket movement.
